item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll inspect the specified source files, make the minimal schema/model/query changes, then run the test suite.

The live schema enforces a required `createdAt` field, while the existing account helper does not supply it; the baseline test therefore fails before exercising the requested field. I’ll preserve the existing API by having the account model populate that required schema value, alongside validating and persisting the new optional enum field.

item.aggregated_output:
npm notice run build-bench-mongo-schema-evolution-enterprise@1.0.0 test
npm notice run node tests/acceptance.test.mjs
Build-Bench enterprise acceptance passed: mongo

item.text:
Implemented the account payment preference support.

- Added optional enum validation for `preferredPaymentMethod`.
- Stored it through account create/update.
- Added it to `getOrderSummary`.
- Account creation now supplies the schema-required `createdAt`.

Verified with `npm test` — passing.
